meaning: adj.发嗡嗡声的,声音低沉单调的
examples: A plane was droning in the distance.
Never mind people droning on about "unconditional love" - what she needs is concrete help.
EUROPEANS have learned to let their attention drift when Brussels starts droning on about "process".
"We're not pasty guys in white lab coats droning on about chip specs, " he says.
It's also aggressively Eastern in feel lots of incense, sitar music and chanting, accompanied by a droning harmonium.
